name: contextnest
description: AI Context Control Plane — query and retrieve governed context from local vaults using selectors like #tag, type:document, and [[Title]].

tools.name: context_query
tools.description: Run a selector query against the context vault (#tag, type:X, [[Title]], +AND, |OR, -NOT)

tools.name: context_get
tools.description: Get full content of a specific context node by title or ID

tools.name: context_list
tools.description: Browse vault contents with optional type/tag/limit filters

tools.name: context_resolve
tools.description: Full context resolution pipeline with optional token budget

tools.name: context_overview
tools.description: Get a complete vault overview — all nodes, types, tags, and snippets. Use first to understand what's available.

tools.name: context_search
tools.description: Full-text search across all node content, titles, tags, and metadata by keyword

tools.name: context_init
tools.description: Load the vault's CONTEXT.md — the vault's identity and starting instructions. Call this first.

tools.name: context_create
tools.description: Create a new context node in the vault with title, content, type, tags, and scope

tools.name: context_update
tools.description: Update an existing node — replace or append content, add tags, change scope

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Backend mode: 'local' reads vault files directly, 'api' connects to a ContextNest API server. Enter 'local' or 'api'.

vault_path.title: Vault Path
vault_path.description: Path to your context vault directory (required for local mode)

api_url.title: API URL
api_url.description: ContextNest API base URL, e.g. http://localhost:3001 (required for api mode)

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Access level: 'read-write' allows creating/updating nodes, 'read-only' disables write tools. Enter 'read-write' or 'read-only'.
